chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 395 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (Priority) 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of CMA No.1735/2023 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case 29-09-2025 Agha Ather Hussain Pathan, Assistant AG Sindh >>>>>><<<<<<< Syed Naimat Ali Shah, Advocate holding brief for Mr. Sohail Ahmed Khoso, learned counsel for the Petitioner submits that he has been instructed by the latter not to press instant Constitutional Petition. Accordingly, the same is dismissed as not pressed along with listed application. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
